cases.title: TS-31: Assigned instructor opens class-subject attendance report with roster and summary counts
preconditions: Instructor A has ClassAssignment for class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101
At least one Closed session for HESD-01 / SWE-101 with mixed Present, Absent, and Excused attendance
Authenticated Instructor A session with report:read for assigned scope
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert response classCode HESD-01 and subjectCode SWE-101 match filters
Assert students array contains tabular rows with institutionalId, displayName, presentCount, absentCount, excusedCount, and attendanceRate per API design §8.2
Assert sessionsHeld reflects closed sessions in date range
GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId for a Closed session in HESD-01 / SWE-101 and assert per-student status roster returned
cases.expected: BR-08 allows report access when instructor is assigned to requested class-subject pair; tabular roster with summary counts returned per testing-plan TS-31 and AC-12a

cases.title: ReportService enforces ClassAssignment scope at repository boundary with real PostgreSQL
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with ClassAssignment linking Instructor A to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
Closed sessions and attendance records exist for HESD-01/SWE-101 and for HESD-02/SWE-102 (unassigned to Instructor A)
ReportService wired with attendance and roster read models per reporting-export module §2.6
steps: Invoke ReportService.getClassSubjectSummary({ classCode: HESD-01, subjectCode: SWE-101, from, to }, instructorAId)
Assert SummaryDto contains students and counts only from assigned class-subject sessions
Invoke ReportService.getClassSubjectSummary({ classCode: HESD-02, subjectCode: SWE-102, from, to }, instructorAId)
Assert BR-08 scope rejection with 403 ReportAccessDenied or Forbidden and no cross-assignment rows in result
Verify SQL query joins class_assignments on instructorId, classId, and subjectId
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: ReportService returns data only when ClassAssignment matches requested class-subject; unassigned pairs rejected at service/repository layer per BR-08

cases.title: GET /reports/summary returns 200 JSON envelope for assigned instructor scope
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Closed sessions with attendance data exist within requested date range
steps: Send GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 with Instructor A session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains classCode, subjectCode, dateFrom, dateTo, sessionsHeld, and students array per API design §8.2
Assert each student object includes presentCount, absentCount, excusedCount, and attendanceRate
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 success contract for GET /reports/summary when BR-08 assignment scope passes; summary aggregation DTO returned

cases.title: Unassigned instructor receives 403 ReportAccessDenied on GET /reports/summary with no data
preconditions: Instructor B authenticated but has no ClassAssignment for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101
Attendance data exists for HESD-01 / SWE-101
Instructor B lacks assignment scope for requested class-subject per BR-08 and roles-permissions §2.3
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Instructor B session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode ReportAccessDenied
Assert message Bạn không có quyền xem báo cáo này per roles-permissions §2.5
Assert response body contains no student roster or summary data
Repeat with GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId for session in unassigned class and assert same 403 ReportAccessDenied denial
cases.expected: BR-08 blocks unassigned instructor: access denied with localized permission error; no report data returned per AC-12b

cases.title: Student denied GET /reports/summary and /reports/session/:sessionId with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session (no report:read per roles-permissions §2.2)
Known Closed sessionId with attendance data in HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert response contains no attendance roster or peer student data
GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with no roster payload
Verify student retains access only to GET /attendance/me/history per FR-14
cases.expected: Students lack report:read; BR-08 scope check combined with role matrix denies all class-subject report endpoints with no data leak

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin institution-wide report bypasses ClassAssignment scope per BR-08 exception
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with report:read institution-wide
Multiple cohorts (HESD-01, HESD-02) with Closed sessions in June 2026
Sessions outside date filter exist before 2026-06-01 or after 2026-06-30 for boundary contrast
No ClassAssignment rows required for admin user
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using TrainingOfficeAdmin session without classCode filter (institution-wide scope; classCode optional per validation-rules §3.8)
Assert HTTP status 200 and response includes sessionsHeld and students from multiple cohorts within filter
Assert sessions with dates outside from/to range are excluded from aggregation counts
GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 and assert cohort drill-down succeeds
Verify admin is not restricted by ClassAssignment per BR-08 exception clause and AC-12c
cases.expected: BR-08 exception: TrainingOfficeAdmin has institution-wide read access without assignment check; AC-12c satisfied

cases.title: Flow D: Assigned instructor report 200 versus unassigned class-subject 403
preconditions: Instructor A assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101 only; HESD-02 / SWE-102 exists but unassigned to Instructor A
Closed sessions with attendance in both class-subject pairs
steps: Instructor A GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 and assert HTTP 200 with roster data
Instructor A GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-02&subjectCode=SWE-102&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 and assert HTTP 403 ReportAccessDenied per testing-plan §6 Flow D step 2
Confirm Instructor A unassigned response contains no student rows or summary counts
Verify Flow D steps 1–2 per testing-plan §6 tags BR-08
cases.expected: Flow D reporting authorization: assignment scope gates report access; assigned class-subject succeeds, unassigned denied per BR-08

cases.title: GET /reports/session/:sessionId returns 403 ReportAccessDenied for unassigned instructor
preconditions: Closed session in HESD-01 / SWE-101 with mixed attendance statuses
Instructor B authenticated but not assigned to session class-subject pair
steps: Send GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId with Instructor B session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode ReportAccessDenied
Assert message Bạn không có quyền xem báo cáo này
Assert response body contains no per-student attendance rows
cases.expected: HTTP 403 contract for per-session report when BR-08 assignment check fails; no roster data in denial envelope

cases.title: ReportService.getSessionRoster rejects unassigned instructor against PostgreSQL session row
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Closed session in class-subject assigned to Instructor A
Separate Closed session in class-subject not assigned to Instructor A
ReportService.getSessionRoster callable with requesterId context
steps: Invoke ReportService.getSessionRoster(assignedSessionId, instructorAId) and assert ReportDto with student status rows returned
Assert aggregation counts (present, absent, excused) computed from attendance_records join enrollments
Invoke ReportService.getSessionRoster(unassignedSessionId, instructorAId)
Assert BR-08 scope rejection with ReportAccessDenied or Forbidden and no cross-assignment data
Verify session classId and subjectId resolved and matched against class_assignments for requesterId
cases.expected: Per-session report module boundary enforces ClassAssignment scope at service layer with real DB per domain model invariant matrix

cases.title: Instructor assigned to class-subject A denied report for same class with unassigned subject
preconditions: Instructor A assigned only to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Attendance data exists for HESD-01 / SWE-102 (different subject, same class)
Instructor A has no ClassAssignment for SWE-102
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-102&from=2026-06-01&to=2026-06-30 using Instructor A session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with errorCode ReportAccessDenied
Assert no partial roster data from SWE-102 sessions leaked in response
GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-01&subjectCode=SWE-101 for same instructor and assert HTTP 200 for contrast
cases.expected: BR-08 assignment is class-subject pair specific; same class with unassigned subject denied at boundary per ClassAssignment unique triple invariant

cases.title: Assigned instructor filters /reports and views summary cards with attendance roster table
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor A on desktop viewport assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Closed sessions with mixed attendance exist in selected date range
Instructor sidebar shows Báo cáo navigation per page-list §4.5
steps: Navigate to /reports
Select class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 in ReportFilterBar and set date range
Submit filter and wait for report load
Verify ReportSummaryCards display present, absent, and excused counts matching API data
Verify AttendanceRosterTable or SessionReportTable shows student rows with status badges (Present, Absent, Excused)
Click session drill-down link to /reports/sessions and verify per-session roster renders
cases.expected: BR-08 allows UI report journey for assigned instructor: filter bar, summary metrics, and tabular roster with status columns visible

cases.title: Unassigned instructor sees ForbiddenPage when accessing unassigned class-subject report
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor B not assigned to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Attendance data exists for the unassigned class-subject pair
steps: Navigate to /reports and attempt to select or deep-link unassigned class HESD-01 / SWE-101
Verify UI shows permission denied state or redirects to /forbidden per page-list §2.2
Verify localized message Bạn không có quyền xem báo cáo này displayed
Verify no roster table rows or summary cards with peer cohort data rendered
Confirm network tab shows API 403 ReportAccessDenied matching UI guard per BR-08
cases.expected: BR-08 UI journey: unassigned instructor sees permission denied without leaking report data; mirrors rbac-negative API behavior per AC-12b

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin views /admin/reports with institution-wide cohorts and date filter
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin on desktop viewport
Multiple cohorts (HESD-01, HESD-02) with attendance in overlapping date range
Admin sidebar shows Báo cáo per page-list §5.5
steps: Navigate to /admin/reports
Set date filter from 2026-06-01 to 2026-06-30 in ReportFilterBar
Apply filter without restricting to single class (institution-wide view)
Verify SessionReportTable lists sessions from multiple cohorts within date range
Verify ReportSummaryCards reflect cross-cohort aggregate counts
Optionally narrow filter to one classCode and verify table scopes to selected cohort
cases.expected: BR-08 admin exception browser journey: institution-wide report UI shows all cohorts within date filter without assignment restriction

cases.title: GET /reports/session/:sessionId returns 200 per-session roster report envelope for assigned instructor
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor A assigned to Closed session in HESD-01 / SWE-101
Session has enrolled students with mixed Present, Absent, Excused statuses
steps: Send GET /api/v1/reports/session/:sessionId with Instructor A session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response contains session identifier and per-student rows with institutionalId, displayName, attendance status, and checkedInAt when Present
Assert summary counts for present, absent, and excused align with row data per API design §8.1
Assert response body does not contain errorCode on success
cases.expected: HTTP 200 contract for per-session roster report when BR-08 assignment scope passes; tabular roster returned per API design §8.1
